description: The gentle vocalization of melody without words. Hum encompasses contentment expressed through sound, the bridge between speech and song, self-soothing through vibration, and the understanding that humming connects us to our inner harmony.
rationale: The word 'hau' combines open 'ha' with rounded 'u', creating vowel hiatus only. This opening-to-completion structure captures hum as open breath completing in resonant tone.
